---
title: "Generalized Method of Moments"
description: "Moment conditions, weighting matrices, overidentification, and links to OLS/IV."
---

## Motivation {#sec-gmm-motivation}

*This chapter is under development.* It will present GMM as a unifying estimation framework that contains OLS and IV as special cases and scales to richer models.

### What You Will Learn

- How moment conditions identify unknown parameters
- One-step and two-step GMM estimators
- Efficient weighting and overidentification tests
- Connections among OLS, IV/2SLS, and GMM

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming Soon

This chapter will include:

- **Intuition** — “Match sample moments to model moments.”
- **Formalization** — Moment vectors, objective functions, and optimal weights.
- **Proofs** — Consistency, asymptotic normality, and J-test logic (collapsed by default).
- **Interactive code** — GMM estimator behavior under valid and invalid moments.
:::
